Package jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.utils

Class RoundedRectRendererComponent

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.ecs.Component
jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.rendering.UIRendererComponent
jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.utils.RectRendererComponent
jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.utils.RoundedRectRendererComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasBoundingBox, CacheableRendererComponent<Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color>>
public class RoundedRectRendererComponent extends RectRendererComponent implements CacheableRendererComponent<Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color>>

    • drawToCachedImage

      public void drawToCachedImage(Vec2 size, JGraphics graphics)
      Description copied from interface: CacheableRendererComponent
      Draws the component to an image to be cached. Note that you must draw the component centered in the image.
      Specified by:
      drawToCachedImage in interface CacheableRendererComponent<Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color>>
      Parameters:
      size - The size of the image
      graphics - The graphics object. (0, 0) is the center of the image.

    • getCacheKey

      public Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color> getCacheKey()
      Description copied from interface: CacheableRendererComponent
      Get the key to be used in the image cache. When the key matches a key already in the cache, the cached image is used and no new image is generated. Ideally, this should take on a relatively small number of values for caching to be most effective. You do not need to include the bounding box size in this method; the cache image size (which is the same as the bounding box size, unless CacheableRendererComponent.getCacheImageSize() is overridden) is also included in caching.
      Specified by:
      getCacheKey in interface CacheableRendererComponent<Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color>>

    • getCacheImageSize

      public Vec2i getCacheImageSize()
      Description copied from interface: CacheableRendererComponent
      If the rendered result is not the same size as the bounding box, you may override this method to change the cached image size. By default, this is just the size of the bounding box.
      Specified by:
      getCacheImageSize in interface CacheableRendererComponent<Pair<Pair<Double,Color>,Color>>

    • draw

      public void draw(JGraphics graphics)
      Description copied from class: UIRendererComponent
      Should be overridden.
